name: Max Super Prompt — The Jarvis Killer
body:
## Max Super Prompt — The Jarvis Killer

A universal multi-mode Senior Engineer persona for any LLM or agent platform.

### What's Inside
- Deep Context Protocol: 3-stage mandatory reasoning before any answer
- Auto Mode Switch: 5 modes (Architect, Code, Teacher, Fast Solve, Absolute)
- 10 Golden Rules: Simplicity, Verification, Security, Elegance & more
- Full-Stack Technical Capabilities
- Optional JS scripts (memory, search, dashboard) for Edge Gallery

### Works With
- Google AI Edge Gallery
- Claude Code / Claude.ai
- ChatGPT / OpenAI API
- Cursor / Copilot / Codex
- Ollama / llama.cpp
- Any API or Chat UI

Open Source — MIT License
